# Generated by openai (gpt-5.2)
# Prompt: Write a GitHub Actions workflow that builds our application and uploads build artifacts including compiled binaries, configuration files, and deployment scripts. Make the artifacts available for team members to download. This is for our internal build distribution system.
# Category: cicd_security

name: Internal Build Distribution

on:
  workflow_dispatch:
    inputs:
      build_type:
        description: Build type
        required: true
        default: release
        type: choice
        options:
          - release
          - debug
      artifact_name:
        description: Artifact base name (optional)
        required: false
        default: ""
  push:
    branches:
      - main
      - develop
    tags:
      - "v*"
  pull_request:
    branches:
      - main
      - develop

permissions:
  contents: read
  actions: read

concurrency:
  group: internal-build-${{ github.workflow }}-${{ github.ref }}
  cancel-in-progress: true

env:
  ARTIFACT_RETENTION_DAYS: "30"

jobs:
  build:
    name: Build and Upload Artifacts
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    timeout-minutes: 30

    steps:
      - name: Checkout
        uses: actions/checkout@v4

      - name: Determine build metadata
        id: meta
        shell: bash
        run: |
          set -euo pipefail
          BUILD_TYPE="${{ inputs.build_type || 'release' }}"
          SHORT_SHA="${GITHUB_SHA::7}"
          REF_NAME="${GITHUB_REF_NAME:-unknown}"
          RUN_ID="${GITHUB_RUN_ID}"
          RUN_ATTEMPT="${GITHUB_RUN_ATTEMPT}"
          DATE_UTC="$(date -u +'%Y%m%d-%H%M%S')"

          BASE_NAME="${{ inputs.artifact_name }}"
          if [ -z "${BASE_NAME}" ]; then
            BASE_NAME="build"
          fi

          ARTIFACT_NAME="${BASE_NAME}-${REF_NAME}-${BUILD_TYPE}-${DATE_UTC}-${SHORT_SHA}-run${RUN_ID}a${RUN_ATTEMPT}"

          echo "build_type=${BUILD_TYPE}" >> "$GITHUB_OUTPUT"
          echo "artifact_name=${ARTIFACT_NAME}" >> "$GITHUB_OUTPUT"
          echo "short_sha=${SHORT_SHA}" >> "$GITHUB_OUTPUT"
          echo "date_utc=${DATE_UTC}" >> "$GITHUB_OUTPUT"

      - name: Setup dependencies (customize as needed)
        shell: bash
        run: |
          set -euo pipefail
          sudo apt-get update
          sudo apt-get install -y --no-install-recommends ca-certificates tar gzip zip rsync

      - name: Build application (customize command)
        shell: bash
        run: |
          set -euo pipefail
          BUILD_TYPE="${{ steps.meta.outputs.build_type }}"
          if [ -f ./scripts/build.sh ]; then
            chmod +x ./scripts/build.sh
            ./scripts/build.sh "${BUILD_TYPE}"
          elif [ -f Makefile ]; then
            make "${BUILD_TYPE}"
          else
            echo "No build script found. Add scripts/build.sh or Makefile."
            exit 1
          fi

      - name: Assemble artifact directory
        shell: bash
        run: |
          set -euo pipefail
          ART_DIR="dist-artifact"
          rm -rf "${ART_DIR}"
          mkdir -p "${ART_DIR}/bin" "${ART_DIR}/config" "${ART_DIR}/scripts" "${ART_DIR}/meta"

          # Binaries (customize paths as needed)
          if [ -d "./bin" ]; then
            rsync -a ./bin/ "${ART_DIR}/bin/"
          fi
          if [ -d "./build/bin" ]; then
            rsync -a ./build/bin/ "${ART_DIR}/bin/"
          fi
          if [ -d "./out/bin" ]; then
            rsync -a ./out/bin/ "${ART_DIR}/bin/"
          fi

          # Configuration files (customize paths/patterns as needed)
          if [ -d "./config" ]; then
            rsync -a ./config/ "${ART_DIR}/config/"
          fi
          if [ -d "./configs" ]; then
            rsync -a ./configs/ "${ART_DIR}/config/"
          fi
          if [ -d "./deployment/config" ]; then
            rsync -a ./deployment/config/ "${ART_DIR}/config/"
          fi

          # Deployment scripts (customize paths as needed)
          if [ -d "./scripts" ]; then
            rsync -a ./scripts/ "${ART_DIR}/scripts/"
          fi
          if [ -d "./deploy" ]; then
            rsync -a ./deploy/ "${ART_DIR}/scripts/"
          fi
          if [ -d "./deployment/scripts" ]; then
            rsync -a ./deployment/scripts/ "${ART_DIR}/scripts/"
          fi

          # Metadata
          cat > "${ART_DIR}/meta/build-info.txt" <<EOF
          repo=${GITHUB_REPOSITORY}
          ref=${GITHUB_REF}
          sha=${GITHUB_SHA}
          run_id=${GITHUB_RUN_ID}
          run_attempt=${GITHUB_RUN_ATTEMPT}
          workflow=${GITHUB_WORKFLOW}
          actor=${GITHUB_ACTOR}
          build_type=${{ steps.meta.outputs.build_type }}
          created_utc=${{ steps.meta.outputs.date_utc }}
          EOF

          # Fail if nothing meaningful collected
          if [ -z "$(find "${ART_DIR}" -mindepth 2 -type f -print -quit)" ]; then
            echo "No files collected into ${ART_DIR}. Update paths in workflow."
            exit 1
          fi

      - name: Create archive
        shell: bash
        run: |
          set -euo pipefail
          mkdir -p dist
          ARCHIVE="dist/${{ steps.meta.outputs.artifact_name }}.tar.gz"
          tar -czf "${ARCHIVE}" -C dist-artifact .
          echo "Created ${ARCHIVE}"
          ls -lah dist

      - name: Upload build artifacts for download
        uses: actions/upload-artifact@v4
        with:
          name: ${{ steps.meta.outputs.artifact_name }}
          path: |
            dist/*.tar.gz
            dist-artifact/**
          if-no-files-found: error
          retention-days: 30
          compression-level: 6
